title: V1.2.1
body:
As the title says.

I'll be creating a v1.3.0 PR shortly.  We should only merge one of the two based on @rhatdan and @vrothberg's thoughts.

comments.body: Only this or #1157 should be merged at this time.
Let's rebase and then we can merge and start the release.
Killing, will spin up a new PR as I'm still having problems rebasing.
